benefits.description: FDA approved under brand name Egrifta for visceral and abdominal fat loss. Clinical trials found 17% reduction in visceral/abdominal fat over six months in HIV patients with lipodystrophy.

protocol_notes: FDA approval was approximately ten years prior to 2021 post date (circa 2011). Approved specifically for visceral and abdominal fat loss in HIV patients whose antiretroviral medications cause disproportionate fat accumulation. Brand name: Egrifta.
